## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance reporting, and link acquisition updates.](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 articles ready for review in Airtable; content style adjusted to be more conversational yet professional](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [New CMS (Craft) migration in progress; training and access details pending](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Newsletter launch planned with \~7,000 subscribers; content strategy shifting to include more specific, actionable topics](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [GA4 integration now providing engagement metrics for published content](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Website relaunch tomorrow with updated messaging and product positioning](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [7 articles published Monday; no new publications this week due to CMS migration](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [10 articles ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Content style adjusted to be more conversational yet professional](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [New assignments (rows 66-80 in Airtable) focus on specific jobs-to-be-done for growth marketers](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Shift towards more specific, lower-volume keywords to support newsletter content and sales team needs](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Newsletter and Distribution Plans

  - [\~7,000 subscribers in cleaned Marketo list](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Launch plan needed to avoid spam issues](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Content strategy aims to balance SEO-driven articles with more targeted, interest-piquing pieces](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [GA4 integration now providing engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Example: LLM for marketing page shows 20% bounce rate (80% engagement) with 10 sessions](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [ChatGPT referrals account for 0.2% of total traffic](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

### Website and Product Updates

  - [Website relaunch scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Updated messaging and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Product repackaging: "Advanced" and "Ad Room"](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Internal documentation on new messaging still in progress](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

### Link Acquisition

  - [4 new links added this week (not yet live)](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Current strategy focuses on homepage links with "AI for growth marketing" anchor text](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Recommendation to diversify link targets to include core landing pages and high-potential blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - [Monthly updates to keyword list in content OS](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Process involves ChatGPT for ideation and SEMrush for keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Topic cluster approach still valuable, but execution should be flexible and aligned with product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Colin to share internal documentation on new messaging and product positioning when available](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Hold off on competitor comparison articles for at least a month](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Jakub to discuss link diversification strategy with Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Colin to organize and review keyword lists from GrowthX and SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Team to receive Craft CMS access and training materials when available](https://fathom.video/share/i75osSTXY8GzRCAx4BUKcsdHap4RLq1L?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
